semantic.role: Engine that aggregates all scanned index documents into a comprehensive architectural dossier (God Document) for the entire repository.
responsibilities: Read and parse the .spine/index directory to discover all folder and file index documents.
Build a consolidated ledger (FileLedgerEntry) for every indexed file, summarizing role, responsibilities, public surface, dependencies, and drift status.
Aggregate the ledger into a structured report that covers statistics, dependency analysis, drift tracking, and architectural highlights.
Write the final God Document to .spine/view/pages/god.md using the OutputManager infrastructure.
outOfScope: Source code scanning and AST extraction (handled by scanner engines).
CLI command dispatch and user interaction (handled by cli/ layer).
LLM-based summarization or fix generation (handled by fix/infra/llm modules).
Real-time incremental change detection (handled by git scanner or sync service).
invariants: Must not import any CLI entrypoint or command module.
Must remain decoupled from service-level orchestration; it is a standalone analytical engine.
All data must be sourced from the .spine/index directory; no direct filesystem reads of source code.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a holistic, machine-readable view of the entire repository's architecture by collapsing index data into a single authoritative dossier.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era: establish the god mode as the ultimate aggregator for cross-module architectural insight.

publicSurface.description: Reads all index documents under .spine/index, constructs a complete architectural dossier (FileLedgerEntry array), aggregates statistics and drift information, and writes the result as a Markdown document (god.md) to the view output directory. Called by the pipeline or directly for full-repository architecture reports.
